chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT, COURT MIRPURKHAS Before: JUSTICE ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON. JUSTICE RIAZAT ALI SAHAR. C.P No.D-948 of 2025 Petitioners: Mst Salma & another Through Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar, Advocate. Respondents: Through Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant Advocate General. Date of hearing: 24.12.2025. Date of decision: 24.12.2025. ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J. The petitioners, Mst. Salma and Zafar Ali, have filed the instant constitutional petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking directions to the respondent-NADRA to correct the date of birth and parentage of the petitioners, which were wrongly recorded in the certificate of below eighteen years of age issued by NADRA through the concerned Union Council Behram Bari, Taluka and District Sanghar. On 17.12.2025, notices were issued to the respondents with directions to file their comments and to redress the grievance of the petitioners regarding the correction of date of birth and parentage as recorded in the said certificate, and to submit a compliance report. Since no body is in attendance on behalf of the NADRA, therefore this court is left with no option but to directed the competent authority of to examine the record and correct the date of birth and parentage of the petitioners as recorded in the certificate of below eighteen years of age, strictly in accordance with law. NADRA is further directed to complete the needful within a period of two weeks, and a copy of this order shall be communicated to the concerned authorities for compliance. In view of the above, without touching the merits of the case, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of.

NADRA is further directed to complete the needful within a period of two weeks, and a copy of this order shall be communicated to the concerned authorities for compliance. In view of the above, without touching the merits of the case, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
